homepage.heroSubline: Protecting Bay Area homes with durable, beautiful siding. Quality craftsmanship, guaranteed.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Driven by Quality
aboutText: Home Roofing & Siding Co was founded over a decade ago with a simple goal: to provide San Francisco homeowners with reliable siding solutions built to withstand the elements. We're a local company, born and raised in the Bay Area, and we understand the unique challenges our climate presents.

We believe in doing things right the first time. From initial consultation to final inspection, our team is committed to meticulous workmanship and clear communication. We use only premium materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting performance and curb appeal.

We're proud to be a part of the San Francisco community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible waste management and sustainable sourcing practices.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule a free consultation and discover the perfect siding solution for your needs.

services.name: Vinyl Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable, affordable, and low-maintenance siding for San Francisco homes.
services.description: Vinyl siding remains a popular choice for San Francisco homeowners seeking a balance of affordability, durability, and ease of maintenance. Our expert installation ensures a weather-tight seal, protecting your home from the Bay Area's unpredictable weather, from the fog-laden summers to the occasional heavy rains. We offer a wide variety of colors and styles to complement any architectural design, from Victorian homes in the Mission District to modern residences in SOMA. Our team handles every aspect of the installation process, from removing old siding to properly insulating your walls, guaranteeing a seamless and long-lasting result. We only use top-quality vinyl products that resist fading, cracking, and warping, giving you peace of mind for years to come. With proper care, vinyl siding can significantly enhance your home's curb appeal and value.
process: Step 3: Old Siding Removal and Surface Preparation
benefits: Wide variety of colors and styles
Enhanced curb appeal and home value

faq.question: How long does vinyl siding last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 30-40 years or more.

faq.question: Is vinyl siding environmentally friendly?
faq.answer: Modern vinyl siding is recyclable, and its long lifespan reduces waste and resource consumption.

faq.question: How much does vinyl siding cost?
faq.answer: The cost varies depending on the size of your home and the specific type of vinyl siding you choose. We offer free, detailed quotes.

services.name: Fiber Cement Siding
services.shortDescription: Durable and versatile siding that mimics the look of wood or stucco.
services.description: Fiber cement siding is an excellent choice for San Francisco homes seeking a blend of aesthetics and resilience. This siding material is known for its ability to withstand the elements, resisting moisture, fire, and pests. It can be manufactured with a wood-grain texture that looks like traditional wood siding or with a smooth surface that mimics stucco, making it a versatile option for different architectural styles. Fiber cement is particularly well-suited to the often damp and foggy San Francisco climate, where moisture resistance is key to preventing rot and decay. Our experienced team provides expert installation, ensuring that your siding is properly sealed and protected. We offer a wide range of colors and finishes to match your home's aesthetic.
process: Step 2: Custom Design and Material Selection
Step 3: Precision Installation by Skilled Professionals
Step 4: Final Inspection and Quality Assurance
benefits: Resistant to moisture, fire, and pests
Increased home value and curb appeal

faq.question: How often does fiber cement siding need to be painted?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding typically needs to be repainted every 10-15 years, depending on the climate and the quality of the paint.

faq.question: Is fiber cement siding more expensive than vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Yes, fiber cement siding generally costs more than vinyl siding due to its superior durability and aesthetic appeal.

faq.question: Does fiber cement siding require special maintenance?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding requires minimal maintenance. Regular cleaning with a garden hose is usually sufficient to keep it looking its best.

services.name: Wood Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Classic wood siding for timeless beauty and natural appeal.
services.description: For homeowners seeking a classic and natural aesthetic, wood siding remains a timeless choice. We specialize in the installation of various wood siding options, including clapboard, shingles, and shakes. We understand the unique challenges of maintaining wood siding in San Francisco's climate, and we take extra precautions to ensure its longevity. This includes proper sealing, painting, and regular maintenance. We use only high-quality wood products that are resistant to rot and decay. Our experienced team provides expert installation, ensuring that your wood siding is properly installed and protected. We offer a wide range of colors and finishes to match your home's aesthetic.
process: Step 4: Painting or Staining for Protection and Beauty
benefits: Increased home value and curb appeal

faq.question: How often does wood siding need to be painted or stained?
faq.answer: Wood siding typically needs to be repainted or stained every 3-5 years, depending on the climate and the type of wood used.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for siding in San Francisco?
faq.answer: Redwood and cedar are excellent choices for siding in San Francisco due to their natural resistance to rot and decay.

faq.question: How can I protect my wood siding from moisture damage?
faq.answer: Proper sealing and regular maintenance are essential to protect wood siding from moisture damage. We offer comprehensive maintenance services to keep your wood siding looking its best.

services.name: Siding Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert repair and replacement services to restore your home's siding.
services.description: Over time, siding can become damaged due to weather, pests, or accidents. We offer comprehensive siding repair and replacement services to restore your home's protection and curb appeal. Whether you have cracked vinyl siding, rotting wood siding, or damaged fiber cement siding, our team can assess the damage and provide effective solutions. We use only high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a lasting repair. If your siding is beyond repair, we can provide expert replacement services, matching your existing siding as closely as possible or upgrading to a new material. We handle every aspect of the repair or replacement process, from removing old siding to properly installing the new siding, guaranteeing a seamless and long-lasting result.

faq.question: How do I know if my siding needs to be repaired or replaced?
faq.answer: Signs of damaged siding include cracks, holes, rotting, warping, and fading. If you notice any of these issues, contact us for a free inspection.

faq.question: Can you match my existing siding?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match most types of siding. We have access to a wide range of materials and colors to ensure a seamless repair or replacement.

faq.question: How long does siding repair or replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of the repair or replacement process depends on the extent of the damage and the size of your home. We will provide a detailed timeline before starting the work.

services.name: Siding Inspection Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive siding inspections to identify potential problems early.
services.description: Regular siding inspections are crucial for maintaining the integrity of your home's exterior. We offer comprehensive siding inspection services to identify potential problems early, before they escalate into costly repairs. Our experienced inspectors will thoroughly examine your siding for signs of damage, including cracks, holes, rotting, warping, and fading. We will also check for proper sealing and insulation. After the inspection, we will provide you with a detailed report outlining our findings and recommendations. Early detection of siding problems can save you money and prevent further damage to your home.
benefits: Peace of mind knowing your home is protected

faq.question: How often should I have my siding inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your siding inspected at least once a year, especially after severe weather events.

faq.question: What does a siding inspection include?
faq.answer: A siding inspection includes a thorough visual examination of your siding, moisture testing, and a detailed report with recommendations.

faq.question: How much does a siding inspection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a siding inspection depends on the size of your home and the type of siding. Contact us for a free quote.

services.name: Siding Material Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's value and protection with premium siding materials.
services.description: Looking to boost your home's curb appeal and resilience? We offer expert siding material upgrades, replacing your existing siding with premium options like fiber cement, engineered wood, or insulated vinyl. These advanced materials provide superior protection against the elements, enhance energy efficiency, and elevate your home's aesthetic. Our team guides you through the selection process, considering your budget, style preferences, and the specific needs of your San Francisco property. We handle the entire upgrade process with precision and care, ensuring a seamless transition to a more durable and beautiful exterior.
process: Step 3: Professional Removal of Old Siding
Step 4: Expert Installation of New Siding
benefits: Enhanced home value and curb appeal

faq.question: What are the benefits of insulated vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Insulated vinyl siding provides increased energy efficiency, sound dampening, and impact resistance compared to traditional vinyl siding.

faq.question: Is fiber cement siding a good choice for historic homes?
faq.answer: Yes, fiber cement siding can be manufactured to mimic the look of traditional wood siding, making it a suitable choice for historic homes in San Francisco.

faq.question: How does engineered wood siding compare to natural wood siding?
faq.answer: Engineered wood siding offers similar aesthetics to natural wood but is more resistant to moisture, rot, and pests, requiring less maintenance.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Home Roofing & Siding Co did an amazing job installing vinyl siding on my Victorian home in the Haight. The crew was professional, efficient, and the finished product looks fantastic! My house looks brand new.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We chose fiber cement siding for our home in Noe Valley, and we're very happy with the results. The siding looks great and seems very durable. The installation team was courteous and cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done. Minor hiccups with scheduling, but overall a good experience.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Home Roofing & Siding Co repaired some storm damage to our wood siding in the Richmond District. They were prompt, professional, and the repair is seamless. You can't even tell there was damage! Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Robert M.
reviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish. The team at Home Roofing & Siding Co installed new vinyl siding on my home. The price was competitive, and the quality of work was outstanding. They paid attention to every detail and made sure I was completely satisfied.

reviews.name: Susan P.
reviews.text: We had fiber cement siding installed on our house in Pacific Heights. The siding looks beautiful, and the installation was done professionally. There was a slight delay in the project due to a material shortage, but the company communicated well throughout the process.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: I hired Home Roofing & Siding Co for a siding inspection before buying a house in Bernal Heights. Their detailed report helped me identify some potential issues and negotiate a better price. The inspector was knowledgeable and thorough.

service-areas.title: Service Areas | Home Roofing & Siding Co
service-areas.description: Home Roofing & Siding Co provides siding services in San Francisco and surrounding areas.

serviceAreas.content:
Home Roofing & Siding Co is proud to offer our comprehensive siding services to the residents of San Francisco. From the vibrant neighborhoods of North Beach and the Mission District to the iconic Victorian homes of Alamo Square, we understand the unique architectural styles and weather patterns that define this beautiful city. We are committed to providing top-quality siding installation, repair, and replacement services to protect and enhance your home's curb appeal. 

Our experienced team uses only the best materials and techniques to ensure lasting results. Whether you need to repair damaged siding, upgrade to a more energy-efficient option, or completely transform your home's exterior, we're here to help. We offer a wide range of siding options, including vinyl, wood, fiber cement, and more, to suit your style and budget. Our goal is to provide exceptional service and customer satisfaction, making Home Roofing & Siding Co your trusted partner for all your siding needs in San Francisco.
serviceAreas.localContext: San Francisco's diverse architecture and coastal climate require siding solutions that are both aesthetically pleasing and durable enough to withstand the elements. We understand the importance of preserving the city's unique character while providing long-lasting protection for your home.

serviceAreas.content:
Home Roofing & Siding Co extends its expert siding services to the vibrant community of Oakland. Known for its diverse neighborhoods, thriving arts scene, and beautiful waterfront, Oakland presents a unique blend of architectural styles. We are dedicated to providing Oakland homeowners with high-quality siding solutions that enhance the beauty and protect the integrity of their homes. 

We offer a wide range of siding options to meet the diverse needs of Oakland residents, from classic wood siding to durable fiber cement and low-maintenance vinyl. Our experienced team will work closely with you to choose the perfect siding solution for your home, ensuring a seamless installation and lasting results. Whether you're looking to update your home's curb appeal or protect it from the elements, Home Roofing & Siding Co is your trusted partner in Oakland.
serviceAreas.localContext: Oakland's blend of historic homes and modern developments requires siding solutions that complement the city's unique character and provide long-lasting protection against the elements.
